name: extbench-wazero-as
description: AssemblyScript fixture for the Base extension benchmark harness

scripts.asbuild: asc src/assembly/index.ts --target release --outFile validate.wasm --exportRuntime --runtime minimal --use abort=
scripts.asbuild:debug: asc src/assembly/index.ts --target debug --outFile validate.debug.wasm --exportRuntime --runtime minimal --use abort=
